---
title: "Hitter 5 - Hitting Report"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    keep_tex: false
    includes:
      in_header: hitter5_header.tex
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
params:
  excel_path: "/Users/akhichappidi/PDP/2025 PDP Data Exercise.xlsx"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.retina = 1,
  out.width = "100%",
  fig.align = "center"
)

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(patchwork)
library(gt)
library(scales)
library(janitor)

source("../R/utils.R")

excel_path <- params$excel_path

trackman_raw <- readxl::read_excel(excel_path, sheet = "Trackman Data") %>%
  janitor::remove_empty("cols")

hitter_name <- "Hitter 5"

hitter_df <- trackman_raw %>%
  filter(Batter == hitter_name)

if (nrow(hitter_df) == 0) {
  stop("No Trackman rows found for Hitter 5.")
}

total_pitches <- nrow(hitter_df)

valid_calls <- unique(stats::na.omit(trackman_raw$PitchCall))

strike_calls_full <- c(
  "StrikeCalled",
  "StrikeSwinging",
  "FoulBall",
  "FoulBallNotFieldable",
  "FoulBallFieldable",
  "InPlay"
)
swings_calls_full <- c(
  "StrikeSwinging",
  "FoulBall",
  "FoulBallNotFieldable",
  "FoulBallFieldable",
  "InPlay"
)

strike_calls <- intersect(strike_calls_full, valid_calls)
swings_calls <- intersect(swings_calls_full, valid_calls)

if (length(strike_calls) == 0) {
  strike_calls <- c("StrikeCalled", "StrikeSwinging", "FoulBallNotFieldable", "InPlay")
}
if (length(swings_calls) == 0) {
  swings_calls <- c("StrikeSwinging", "FoulBallNotFieldable", "InPlay")
}

strike_pitches <- sum(hitter_df$PitchCall %in% strike_calls, na.rm = TRUE)
swings <- sum(hitter_df$PitchCall %in% swings_calls, na.rm = TRUE)
whiffs <- sum(hitter_df$PitchCall == "StrikeSwinging", na.rm = TRUE)
in_play <- sum(hitter_df$PitchCall == "InPlay", na.rm = TRUE)

ball_calls <- c("BallCalled")
if ("BallinDirt" %in% valid_calls) {
  ball_calls <- union(ball_calls, "BallinDirt")
}

ball_pitches <- sum(hitter_df$PitchCall %in% ball_calls, na.rm = TRUE)

ball_pct <- ifelse(total_pitches > 0, ball_pitches / total_pitches, NA_real_)
strike_pct <- ifelse(total_pitches > 0, strike_pitches / total_pitches, NA_real_)
swing_pct <- ifelse(total_pitches > 0, swings / total_pitches, NA_real_)
whiff_pct <- ifelse(swings > 0, whiffs / swings, NA_real_)

bb_df <- hitter_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(ExitSpeed))

if (nrow(bb_df) > 0) {
  avg_ev <- mean(bb_df$ExitSpeed, na.rm = TRUE)
  max_ev <- max(bb_df$ExitSpeed, na.rm = TRUE)
  avg_la <- mean(bb_df$Angle, na.rm = TRUE)
  p90_ev <- as.numeric(stats::quantile(bb_df$ExitSpeed, 0.9, na.rm = TRUE, type = 7))
} else {
  avg_ev <- NA_real_
  max_ev <- NA_real_
  avg_la <- NA_real_
  p90_ev <- NA_real_
}

overall_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
  Metric = c(
    "Total pitches seen",
    "Ball%",
    "Strike%",
    "Swing%",
    "Whiff%",
    "InPlay count",
    "Avg ExitSpeed (batted balls)",
    "Max ExitSpeed (batted balls)",
    "Avg Launch Angle (batted balls)",
    "90th percentile ExitSpeed"
  ),
  Value = c(
    as.character(total_pitches),
    scales::percent(ball_pct, accuracy = 0.1),
    scales::percent(strike_pct, accuracy = 0.1),
    scales::percent(swing_pct, accuracy = 0.1),
    ifelse(is.na(whiff_pct), "N/A", scales::percent(whiff_pct, accuracy = 0.1)),
    as.character(in_play),
    ifelse(is.na(avg_ev), "N/A", as.character(round(avg_ev, 1))),
    ifelse(is.na(max_ev), "N/A", as.character(round(max_ev, 1))),
    ifelse(is.na(avg_la), "N/A", as.character(round(avg_la, 1))),
    ifelse(is.na(p90_ev), "N/A", as.character(round(p90_ev, 1)))
  )
)

results_tbl <- bb_df %>%
  mutate(
    result_key = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.na(PlayResult) & !is.na(TaggedHitType) ~ paste(PlayResult, "-", TaggedHitType),
      !is.na(PlayResult) ~ PlayResult,
      !is.na(TaggedHitType) ~ TaggedHitType,
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"
    )
  ) %>%
  count(result_key, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(
    pct = n / sum(n)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))

if (nrow(bb_df) > 0) {
  ev_threshold <- stats::quantile(bb_df$ExitSpeed, 0.9, na.rm = TRUE, type = 7)
  bb_df <- bb_df %>%
    mutate(
      is_top_ev = ExitSpeed >= ev_threshold
    )
}

dir.create("../outputs/tmp", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

gt1 <- overall_tbl %>%
  gt() %>%
  cols_label(Metric = "Metric", Value = "Value") %>%
  tab_header(title = "Plate Discipline & Outcomes") %>%
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(10), data_row.padding = px(3), heading.padding = px(3))

gt2 <- if (nrow(results_tbl) > 0) {
  results_tbl %>%
    mutate(`Percent` = scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 0.1)) %>%
    select(`Result` = result_key, `Count` = n, `Percent`) %>%
    gt() %>%
    tab_header(title = "Results Breakdown") %>%
    tab_options(table.font.size = px(10), data_row.padding = px(3), heading.padding = px(3))
} else {
  tibble(Note = "No batted-ball results") %>% gt() %>% tab_header(title = "Results Breakdown")
}

try({
  gt::gtsave(gt1, "../outputs/tmp/hitter_tbl1.png")
  gt::gtsave(gt2, "../outputs/tmp/hitter_tbl2.png")
}, silent = TRUE)

# Plots
ev_la_plot <- if (nrow(bb_df) > 0) {
  ggplot(bb_df, aes(x = Angle, y = ExitSpeed, color = is_top_ev)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#2c7fb8", "TRUE" = "#d73027"),
                       labels = c("Other", "Top EV (90th+)"), name = "") +
    labs(title = "EV vs Launch Angle", x = "Launch Angle (deg)", y = "Exit Velocity (mph)") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal")
} else {
  ggplot() + theme_void() + labs(title = "No batted-ball data")
}

ev_summary_plot <- if (nrow(bb_df) > 0) {
  n_bb <- nrow(bb_df)
  sub <- sprintf("n = %d | avg = %.1f | max = %.1f | p90 = %.1f",
                 n_bb, avg_ev, max_ev, p90_ev)
  ggplot(bb_df, aes(x = 1, y = ExitSpeed)) +
    geom_boxplot(fill = "#2c7fb8", alpha = 0.7, outlier.alpha = 0) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.15, height = 0, alpha = 0.6, size = 1.2) +
    labs(title = "Exit Velocity (Batted Balls)", subtitle = sub, x = "", y = "Exit Speed (mph)") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank())
} else {
  ggplot() + theme_void() + labs(title = "Exit Velocity (Batted Balls)", subtitle = "No data")
}

spray_plot <- if ("Direction" %in% names(bb_df) && nrow(bb_df) > 0) {
  ggplot(bb_df, aes(x = Direction, y = ExitSpeed, color = PlayResult)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5) +
    labs(title = "Spray", x = "Direction (deg)", y = "Exit Speed (mph)", color = "Play Result") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal")
} else {
  ggplot() + theme_void() + labs(title = "Spray (Direction not available)")
}

swings_df <- hitter_df %>%
  filter(PitchCall %in% swings_calls)

if (nrow(swings_df) > 0 && "PlateLocSide" %in% names(swings_df) && "PlateLocHeight" %in% names(swings_df)) {
  swings_df <- swings_df %>%
    mutate(
      PlateLocSide = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(PlateLocSide)),
      PlateLocHeight = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(PlateLocHeight))
    )
}

heatmap_plot <- if (nrow(swings_df) > 0 &&
                    "PlateLocSide" %in% names(swings_df) &&
                    "PlateLocHeight" %in% names(swings_df) &&
                    sum(!is.na(swings_df$PlateLocSide) & !is.na(swings_df$PlateLocHeight)) > 0) {
  p <- ggplot(swings_df, aes(x = PlateLocSide, y = PlateLocHeight)) +
    stat_bin2d(bins = 25) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "#f7fbff", high = "#08306b", name = "Swings") +
    coord_equal(xlim = c(-1.5, 1.5), ylim = c(0, 5)) +
    labs(title = "Swing Map", x = "PlateLocSide", y = "PlateLocHeight") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
    theme(legend.position = "right")
  add_strikezone_9box(p, xmin = -0.83, xmax = 0.83, ymin = 1.5, ymax = 3.5)
} else {
  ggplot() + theme_void() + labs(title = "Swing Map (insufficient data)")
}

plots_combined <- (ev_la_plot | spray_plot) / (ev_summary_plot | heatmap_plot)

if (knitr::is_html_output()) {
  try(ggplot2::ggsave("../outputs/tmp/hitter_plots.png", plot = plots_combined, width = 10, height = 5.5, dpi = 150), silent = TRUE)
}
```

### Summary (Hitter 5)

```{r tables-top, out.width="49%", fig.show="hold"}
if (file.exists("../outputs/tmp/hitter_tbl1.png") && file.exists("../outputs/tmp/hitter_tbl2.png")) {
  knitr::include_graphics(c("../outputs/tmp/hitter_tbl1.png", "../outputs/tmp/hitter_tbl2.png"))
} else {
  gt1
  gt2
}
```

### Visuals

```{r visuals, fig.width=10, fig.height=5, out.width="100%"}
plots_combined
```
